'''Doaskin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|193|Doaskin}}</ref> located in the [[Doaskin system/Legends|Doaskin system]], a part of the [[Bruanii sector/Legends|Bruanii sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> During the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]],<ref name="CSWE" /> which [[Declaration of a New Order|began]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> it served as the [[Tagge Company/Legends|Tagge Company's]] primary base for operations in the [[Greater Javin/Legends|Greater Javin]] region.<ref name="CSWE" /> By the [[Time/Legends|time]] not long after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]<ref name="Rough" /> of [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="NEC" /> [[Planet Dreams, Incorporated]] had custom-developed and sold to the [[House of Tagge/Legends|House of Tagge]] a compound at Doaskin, with the company's primary [[Gender/Legends|saleswoman]] [[Treva Horme]] being credited with seeing the deal through.<ref name="Rough" />

==Behind the scenes==
The name "Doaskin" was introduced in reference to House of Tagge's compound mentioned in [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' supplement "[[Rough and Tundra]]," which was published on [[Wizards.com]] on [[March 25]], [[2004]].<ref name="Rough" /> [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' subsequently established it as a planet.<ref name="CSWE" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Doaskin [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet, in grid square K-18.<ref name="TEA" />
